title: Lumegrin's Advent: Masik's Puzzle Dungeon
description: Modpack focused on complimenting the Masik's Puzzle Dungeon mod
body:
This is a modpack centred around the Masik's Puzzle Dungeon mod. The dungeons are 16x more common, making them easier to spot but also a little bit buggier. Woops. Also note that these dungeons can only spawn in Jungles. 

In addition, this modpack comes with the BlockPixel resource pack and Rethinking Voxels shaders, which has been configured to better suit the resource pack. 

Video link will be here shortly
